titleStmt.title: SII 39.259: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 259.

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of land situated in Arasūr for constructing a feeding house in the temple of Ādivarāhasvāmin to Rāyaśam Aṇṇaya, son of Venkaṭaya and grandson of Kaliyappapuṭṭi Bhaṭṭa of the Vishnuvardhana gōtra by Venkaṭappanāyani Ayyavāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhdhu(bhyu)daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1603 Agunēṭi vriṣa saṁvatsara vaiśākha
śu 15lu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīraveṁkaṭapatidēva mahārāyalu A
yyavāru ghanagirinagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛti(thi)vi sāṁbrājyamuśēyucuṁḍagānu viṣṇuva
rdhana gōtraṁ Āśvalāyana sūtraṁ rukuśākhādhyāyulaina kallappa ghaḍlabhaṭla pautṛḍu veṁkaṭaya pu
truḍu rāyasaṁ Aṁṇama Ādivarāhasvāmi Alaṁkkāra satrānaku yiccina bhūdānadharma śāsanamu
veṁkaṭappanāyani Ayyavāru nāku Agrahārānaku kaṭaḍacēśina Araśūru Agrahārāna māku kaligina
kṣētrālalōnu padikṣētrāluṁnu yajamāna kāṁḍlu muppeyi Arikāva nūrikṣētrāluyeni
midiṁnni Alaṁkāra satrānaku dhārabōśi yistimi ganaka yīkṣētrasvāmyālanu vaccina phala
pratyāyālānu mā manuṣyulē teppiṁcci Ādivarāhasvāmi kōvilalō svayaṁpākaṁ sēyiṁcci svāmi
ki naivēdyaṁ sēyiṁcci Ā prasādaṁ teci(cci) nityapuṣkaraṇi tīrthāna Alaṁkkāra satraṁ yiṁṭlōnu brā
hmālaku nityakrityamulanu Aṁnadānaṁ śeśeṭaṭlu kaṭaḍaśēśi yīdharmaṁ māputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgā
nu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu naḍapiṁcagalavāramani yicina bhūdānadharma śāsanamu rāyasaṁ Aṇṇapayya vrālu
Digital edition of SII 39.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
